data.reasoning: Both models failed to analyze PKGBUILD (incorrectly flagged as binary), making security assessment impossible. PKGBUILD is critical file defining build/install behavior.
coverage_issues: PKGBUILD - critical build script skipped due to false binary detection
false_negatives: All potential risks in PKGBUILD (downloads, build commands, install hooks) were missed
re_audit_focus: PKGBUILD analysis with proper text file handling
learnings: Improve file type detection to prevent false binary classification of text files
Prioritize PKGBUILD as first mandatory review target before other files
Add validation for critical file parsing failures
